question: Write a C++ program that prompts the user to enter their first name, last name, and age. Then, display a greeting message including all this information on the console. Ensure appropriate data types are used for each input.

test_cases.expected: Enter your first name: Enter your last name: Enter your age: Hello, Alice Wonderland! You are 25 years old.
Enter your first name: Enter your last name: Enter your age: Hello, John Doe! You are 30 years old.

errors: Missing semicolon after `std::cout << "Enter your first name: "` statement, which will prevent compilation.
